1014 ISLTN_14_CD ISLTN_14_CD O0110M1B Other: Isolation - Infectious Disease (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received isolation or quarantine for active infectious disease while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
